problem: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk?
hypothesis: If Shape memory alloy phase transition is applied to without, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 36 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
